title: Herobrine Mod Alpha Version
description: He creates a creepy atmosphere in the new Herobrine versions that are added.
body:
# Herobrine Mod Alpha Version
**The mod uses nostalgic tweaks for a spooky experience. It adds Herobrine as well as many other versions of Herobrine; in total, there are 28 different types of Herobrine. The mod also adds various symbols such as letters from Herobrine's name made of Glowstone, and other features.**

**the new txture from the moon**
![the new txture from the moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/099392bc5450f6dbf66f0331c0a206145490a4ea_0.webp)

**Mysterious letters made of glowstone appear in the world; no one knows why, but they form the letter from the name Herobrine**
![Mysterious letters made of glowstone appear in the world; no one knows why, but they form the letter from the name Herobrine.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e473fc2b048e0518ffaccefcde13f847a73c911a.png)
There are 3 types of them: a normal one that attacks the player, a miner that also attacks, and a stalker that exhibits a special behavior.
![herobrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be38327feb527b4653e22b18e042d99ccf4b055_0.webp)
These are 2 of a total of 28 variants.
![other herobrine variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9db13862861533dbce474fac02103f3c85b19200_0.webp)
The new ore is generated underground, requires a netherite pickaxe, and drops bedrock ingots.
![bedrock ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d8e4b38f252e3821254ddb6c5e67b103ad2e14.png)
There are two special mobs that actually have nothing to do with Herobrine, but I still thought it would be cool.
![special mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bda4a8dab6c51ff0d0af44652bf945bbf4d6e02.png)
